name: Jerry Bergonzi
abstract: Jerry Bergonzi (born October 21, 1947) is an American jazz tenor saxophonist, composer, and educator.

interviews.title: Jerry Bergonzi interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 7, 2022

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck and Two Generations of Brubeck, with Paul Desmond, Alto Saxophone
Newport Jazz Festival: Dave Brubeck Quartet/ Woody Herman and the Young Thundering Herd

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: Jerry was one of my teachers in college. ... I took private lessons with him at NEC.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Butch Miles
about_quotes.evidence: Jerry Bergonzi was on tenor sax at the time... I had no problem with the odd time signatures because that was something else that I used to practice... I must be a big band drummer
about_quotes.doc_title: Butch Miles interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Sheryl Bailey
about_quotes.evidence: I just started working with Jerry Bergonzi which is incredible... we have something coming out with him on a record he has coming out on Savant
about_quotes.doc_title: Sheryl Bailey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, July 24, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Tony Marino
about_quotes.evidence: Well you’re saying what Jerry Bergonzi said this thing almost off hand... [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah. That’s the truth. That’s a nice light way of putting it you know. But it is, it’s true. You know I never had to do that. And he was a great teacher so –
about_quotes.doc_title: Tony Marino interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 25, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Rick Margitza
about_quotes.evidence: I think that’s actually a very beneficial thing to do... I have —I shouldn’t say developed the ability over the years... it was one of those things called profiles in DownBeat where it wasn’t a full blown article about Jerry Bergonzi
about_quotes.doc_title: Rick Margitza interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 22, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Brubeck
about_quotes.evidence: And Jerry Bergonzi and also the background singer coach was this guy named Luther, Luther Vandross. ... half the guys in that group just quit the music business
